description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a rugged, armored exterior with a predominantly yellow, weathered finish, suggesting heavy use in challenging environments. The body is angular and reinforced, with visible plating and protective elements, including a roof-mounted turret or sensor array. The vehicle has four large, thick-treaded tires designed for off-road performance, and the wheel wells are heavily armored. The front end is equipped with a prominent grille and reinforced bumper, while the rear appears to have additional storage or equipment compartments. The windows are small and reinforced, indicating a focus on occupant protection, and the overall design is reminiscent of a military or tactical urban vehicle.
description: A heavily armored, yellow all-terrain vehicle with four large, rugged tires, reinforced body panels, and a roof-mounted turret or sensor. Its weathered finish and robust design suggest it is built for tough urban or off-road environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vehicle's angular, armored body, large rugged tires, and a roof-mounted turret; the weathered yellow finish and reinforced wheel wells are prominent.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the reinforced bumper, central grille, and the symmetrical placement of the large tires; the turret is visible on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the armored panels, rugged tires, and the vehicle's compact, robust profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back armor, small rear windows, and additional equipment or storage compartments; the vehicle's width and tire placement are evident.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, suitable for both urban and off-road surfaces.
